summary_raw: 37 analysts, Strong Buy consensus. Avg PT $270.73 (MarketBeat), $275.25 (consensus), $274.38 (TipRanks). High $380, low $195-220. Current price ~$208. 57 of 60 firms rate Buy or Strong Buy, 2 Holds, 1 Sell. 29-36% implied upside.
